docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AZAR, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, YUHENG F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, YUHENG F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AZAR, ALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, YUHENG F. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LIN, YUHENG F. HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-13-1998, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AZAR, ALI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIN, YUHENG F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
